ogTitle: Wonga Park vs Wongungarra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wonga Park and Wongungarra.
heading: Wonga Park vs Wongungarra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wonga Park, Victoria and Wongungarra, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wonga Park has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Wongungarra (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wonga Park or Wongungarra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wonga Park has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Wongungarra scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wonga Park scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Wongungarra scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wonga Park or Wongungarra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wonga Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
